title: Export ygg_addr_from_pubkey from lichen-core and update lichen-link::identity.rs to use it
description: Remove duplicated yggdrasil_addr_from_pubkey from identity.rs. Update Identity::from_seed, tests, and re-exports in lib.rs to use lichen_core::addr::ygg_addr_from_pubkey. Ensure no_std compatibility.
close_reason: Implemented export of ygg_addr_from_pubkey to lichen-core::addr, removed duplicate from lichen-link::identity.rs, updated from_seed/tests/reexports. Tests and vectors logic preserved. Changes committed and pushed.
